description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 41 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 18 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment One zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches Two elasticated mesh pockets on the sides for enhanced spaceOne pocket on the front with an asymmetric openingPadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and graphic printCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
